mapper.sql: authority_id ,authority_nm ,purpose ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt ,(select string_agg(role_id, ',') from cmmt_authority_role where authority_id = a.authority_id) as role_ids
mapper.select: /** CmmtAuthorityDao.selectByRoleId */ SELECT b.authority_id , b.role_id , b.creator_id , b.created_dt FROM cmmt_authority a JOIN cmmt_authority_role b ON a.authority_id = b.authority_id WHERE b.role_id = #{roldId}
